title: Patriotic Vintage Buttercream Cake
alt_text: White custom cake with red and blue vintage-style buttercream piping and blue bows on a wooden cake stand.
notes: Strong finished-cake image. Niche patriotic theme, so good for gallery but probably not homepage-featured.

title: Golf Cart Sweet 16 Cake
alt_text: Custom golf-themed birthday cake with a golf cart topper, putting green design, and piped birthday lettering.
notes: Good themed birthday example. Avoid using customer name in title/alt.

title: Golf-Themed 65th Birthday Cake
alt_text: White custom birthday cake decorated as a golf course with piped grass, sand trap detail, flag, and golfer silhouette.
notes: Another strong golf-themed custom cake. Good supporting image in custom cakes.

title: Holiday Macaron Assortment
alt_text: Assorted holiday macarons in festive Christmas colors and patterns arranged on a serving tray.
notes: Seasonal image. Great for macarons gallery, especially during holiday season.

title: Floral Sixtieth Celebration Cake
alt_text: Two-tier white celebration cake with textured buttercream, fresh florals, and a glitter 'Sixty' topper.
notes: One of the strongest images in this set. Elegant, polished, and broadly appealing.

title: Cake Tasting Box
alt_text: Branded cake tasting box with assorted cake flavors in individual dessert containers and sample packaging.
notes: Best fit under Wedding Cakes because current site categories are limited. Good supporting image for tasting/consultation marketing.

title: University of Utah Celebration Cake
alt_text: White custom cake with a bold red university-inspired design, red and white buttercream swirls, and festive sprinkles.
notes: Strong themed cake example. Good for school spirit or graduation-related browsing.

title: Holiday Macaron Gift Box Assortment
alt_text: Collage of boxed holiday macarons including snowman, peppermint, gingerbread, hot cocoa, and white chocolate styles.
notes: Seasonal collage. Great for macarons gallery and holiday marketing.

title: Strawberry First Birthday Cake
alt_text: Pink first birthday cake with piped ruffles, strawberry details, daisy accents, and 'one' lettering.
notes: Very strong customer-facing image. Good candidate for featured placement within Custom Cakes.

title: Elegant Raspberry Buttercream Cake
alt_text: White buttercream cake topped with fresh raspberries and detailed vintage-style piping on a cake stand.
notes: Excellent broad-appeal image. Could also work well in wedding-related marketing if multi-assignment is supported.

title: Strawberry Cookie and Macaron Box
alt_text: Gift box with strawberry-themed decorated sugar cookies, flower cookies, and pink and red macarons.
notes: Strong image with good color and product variety. Good candidate for sugar cookies gallery and seasonal/social use.

title: St. Patrick's Day DIY Cookie Kit
alt_text: St. Patrick's Day DIY cookie decorating kit with shamrock cookies, frosting bags, sprinkles, and decorating instructions.
notes: Useful seasonal product image. Since DIY kits may be less emphasized on v2, keep as supporting gallery content rather than a featured item.

title: Christmas Holiday Macarons
alt_text: Holiday macarons in festive Christmas colors arranged on a cake stand with Christmas decor.
notes: Great seasonal lifestyle image. Best used during the holiday season or in the macarons section.

title: Assorted Seasonal Macarons
alt_text: Assorted seasonal macarons with pie, cocoa, cream, and fall-inspired designs arranged on a marble tray.
notes: Solid macaron variety image. Useful for showing flavor/design range.

title: Merry & Bright Christmas Cookie Kit
alt_text: Merry and Bright Christmas cookie decorating kit with shaped sugar cookies, frosting, sprinkles, and edible glitter dust.
notes: Good branded product packaging image. Use seasonally; not a top evergreen homepage image.

title: St. Patrick's Day Rainbow Cupcakes
alt_text: St. Patrick's Day cupcakes with green frosting, rainbow buttercream, gold accents, and festive decorations.
notes: Strong seasonal cupcake image. Good for cupcake variety, especially around March.

title: Dinosaur-Themed Sugar Cookies
alt_text: Dinosaur-themed decorated sugar cookies with Jurassic-style details, dinosaur eyes, bones, and number eight cookies.
notes: Very strong themed sugar cookie example. I avoided using the protected movie title in the public title, but kept the filename descriptive enough.

title: Floral Number Birthday Cake
alt_text: Number-shaped birthday cake decorated with piped flowers, sunflowers, daisies, ladybugs, and a gold birthday topper.
notes: Strong custom cake image. Broadly useful because it shows detailed piping and shaped cake capability.

title: Valentine Heart Sugar Cookie Box
alt_text: Box of decorated heart-shaped Valentine sugar cookies in red, pink, and white designs.
notes: Good seasonal cookie box image. Strong around Valentine's Day, but secondary priority for evergreen gallery.

title: Blue Macaron Number Cake
alt_text: Blue and white number cake decorated with macarons, buttercream piping, and silver disco ball accents.
notes: Strong specialty cake image and good cross-over example between custom cakes and macarons.
